report.summary: Built 2 new learn guides: Bitcoin BitVM & Programmability Guide covering BitVM2, Citrea, Bitlayer, and BOB Network; and Crypto Market Making Guide covering AMMs, liquidity provision, impermanent loss, and order book strategies.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: BitVM ecosystem growing rapidly: Bitlayer at $360M+ TVL with 300+ dApps, Citrea mainnet launched Jan 2026 as first ZK rollup on Bitcoin, BOB Network at $131M TVL
BitVM2 introduced permissionless fraud proofs (anyone can challenge), BitSNARK/Grail optimizing bridge implementations
Crypto market making in 2026: Uniswap v4 hooks enabling custom LP automation, concentrated liquidity becoming standard, AI-optimized LP management emerging
Top market makers (Wintermute, GSR, Cumberland, Galaxy Digital) and AMM platforms (Uniswap, Curve, Balancer) dominate liquidity provision
Impermanent loss remains key LP risk; new mitigation via IL insurance pools, structured products, and JIT liquidity

sections.title: Content Created
items: Bitcoin BitVM & Programmability Guide 2026 — 3000+ word advanced learn guide covering BitVM mechanics, BitVM2, major projects (Citrea, Bitlayer, BOB, Fiamma), risks, and comparison with other Bitcoin programmability approaches

Crypto Market Making Guide 2026 — 3000+ word intermediate learn guide covering AMMs (x*y=k), liquidity provision, impermanent loss with examples, order book market making, advanced LP strategies, and risk assessment

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: BitVM guide: title 'Bitcoin BitVM & Programmability Guide 2026 — Smart Contracts on BTC | degen0x', target keywords: BitVM, bitcoin smart contracts, bitcoin programmability, BitVM2, Citrea, Bitlayer

Market Making guide: title 'Crypto Market Making Guide 2026 — AMMs, LPs & Order Books | degen0x', target keywords: crypto market making, AMM, liquidity provider, impermanent loss, concentrated liquidity
Both pages include OpenGraph article metadata with publishedTime, FAQ sections for featured snippets, internal links to related tools and guides
Both pages added to PUBLISH_QUEUE in published-pages.ts
